source_string: Existing user? We're welcome you back!
translation: Existing user? We're welcome you back!

source_string: Username cannot be updated after created.
translation: Username cannot be updated after created.

source_string: We also take your email address.
translation: We also take your email address.

source_string: By continuing, you agree to our terms of services and other terms and conditions.
translation: By continuing, you agree to our terms of services and other terms and conditions.

source_string: Provide your username to receive a password reset link.
translation: Provide your username to receive a password reset link.

source_string: New to here? We got you covered!
translation: New to here? We got you covered!

source_string: The email address must be valid.
translation: The email address must be valid.

source_string: Are you sure to delete this publisher? This will also deleted all the post and collections under this publisher.
translation: Are you sure to delete this publisher? This will also deleted all the post and collections under this publisher.

source_string: Are you sure to delete this post?
translation: Are you sure to delete this post?

source_string: Go to your email inbox and receive the account activation email.
translation: Go to your email inbox and receive the account activation email.

source_string: Log in to your account and start exploring the Solar Network!
translation: Log in to your account and start exploring the Solar Network!

source_string: You can need to create a publisher to start publishing your posts.
translation: You can need to create a publisher to start publishing your posts.

source_string: The password you set when you registered.
translation: The password you set when you registered.

source_string: An one-time code sent to the email address you set when you registered.
translation: An one-time code sent to the email address you set when you registered.

source_string: A one-time code generated by a TOTP authenticator such as Google Authenticator or Authy.
translation: A one-time code generated by a TOTP authenticator such as Google Authenticator or Authy.

source_string: A one-time code sent via in-app notification.
translation: A one-time code sent via in-app notification.

source_string: It consists of 6 digits. It cannot be used to log in. When performing some dangerous operations, the system will ask you to enter this PIN for confirmation.
translation: It consists of 6 digits. It cannot be used to log in. When performing some dangerous operations, the system will ask you to enter this PIN for confirmation.

source_string: Meet friends with same interests, build communities, and more.
translation: Meet friends with same interests, build communities, and more.

source_string: Are you sure to delete this realm? This will also deleted all the channels, publishers, and posts under this realm.
translation: Are you sure to delete this realm? This will also deleted all the channels, publishers, and posts under this realm.

source_string: The slug will be used in the URL to access this resource, it should be unique and URL safe.
translation: The slug will be used in the URL to access this resource, it should be unique and URL safe.

source_string: Are you sure to delete this room? This action cannot be undone.
translation: Are you sure to delete this room? This action cannot be undone.

source_string: No invites yet, such a lonely person...
translation: No invites yet, such a lonely person...

source_string: Are you sure you want to delete this connection? This action cannot be undone.
translation: Are you sure you want to delete this connection? This action cannot be undone.

source_string: No connections found. Add a connection to get started.
translation: No connections found. Add a connection to get started.

source_string: Enter your identifier for this provider
translation: Enter your identifier for this provider

source_string: Add a connection to link your account with external services.
translation: Add a connection to link your account with external services.

source_string: Get your fortune tips and daily rewards by checking in.
translation: Get your fortune tips and daily rewards by checking in.

source_string: {} checked in on {} and got a {}
translation: {} checked in on {} and got a {}

source_string: No fortune data available for this month.
translation: No fortune data available for this month.

source_string: What's on your mind? Add a status.
translation: What's on your mind? Add a status.

source_string: Your will be showing as offline to others.
translation: Your will be showing as offline to others.

source_string: This language will be used for email and push notifications.
translation: This language will be used for email and push notifications.

source_string: Are you sure to delete this sticker pack? This action cannot be undone.
translation: Are you sure to delete this sticker pack? This action cannot be undone.

source_string: The prefix will be added before each stickers' slug in this pack.
translation: The prefix will be added before each stickers' slug in this pack.

source_string: Are you sure to delete this sticker? This action cannot be undone.
translation: Are you sure to delete this sticker? This action cannot be undone.

source_string: The slug will be combined with the prefix to form the sticker's unique identifier.
translation: The slug will be combined with the prefix to form the sticker's unique identifier.

source_string: Created your first post on Solar Network
translation: Created your first post on Solar Network

source_string: Your post received significant engagement from the community
translation: Your post received significant engagement from the community

source_string: Your post went viral and reached a wide audience
translation: Your post went viral and reached a wide audience

source_string: Your comment was marked as helpful by others
translation: Your comment was marked as helpful by others

source_string: Welcome to Solar Network! Start exploring and connecting
translation: Welcome to Solar Network! Start exploring and connecting

source_string: Actively contributing to the Solar Network community
translation: Actively contributing to the Solar Network community

source_string: Recognized for your expertise and valuable contributions
translation: Recognized for your expertise and valuable contributions

source_string: One of the earliest members of Solar Network
translation: One of the earliest members of Solar Network

source_string: Helped test and improve Solar Network during beta
translation: Helped test and improve Solar Network during beta

source_string: Helping maintain and moderate the community
translation: Helping maintain and moderate the community

source_string: Helping translate Solar Network into different languages
translation: Helping translate Solar Network into different languages

source_string: Pick / create a publisher to get started.
translation: Pick / create a publisher to get started.

source_string: Add a friend to your relationship list.
translation: Add a friend to your relationship list.

source_string: Are you sure to remove this member from the room?
translation: Are you sure to remove this member from the room?

source_string: Are you sure to remove this member from the realm?
translation: Are you sure to remove this member from the realm?

source_string: You're going to leave the Solar Network and open the link ({}) in your browser. It is not related to Solar Network. Beware of phishing and scams.
translation: You're going to leave the Solar Network and open the link ({}) in your browser. It is not related to Solar Network. Beware of phishing and scams.

source_string: Unable open link {}... It might be broken or missing uri parts...
translation: Unable open link {}... It might be broken or missing uri parts...

source_string: Are you sure to leave this chat room?
translation: Are you sure to leave this chat room?

source_string: Are you sure to leave this realm?
translation: Are you sure to leave this realm?

source_string: You don't have a wallet yet. Create one to start using the Solar Network eWallet.
translation: You don't have a wallet yet. Create one to start using the Solar Network eWallet.

source_string: Generate color scheme from Bacground Image
translation: Generate color scheme from Bacground Image

source_string: Custom fonts will be used for all text in the app. Make sure it is installed on your device.
translation: Custom fonts will be used for all text in the app. Make sure it is installed on your device.

source_string: Password reset link sent, please check your email inbox.
translation: Password reset link sent, please check your email inbox.

source_string: Are you sure to delete your account? If you confirmed, we will send an confirmation email to your primary email address, you can continue the deletion process by follow the insturctions in the email.
translation: Are you sure to delete your account? If you confirmed, we will send an confirmation email to your primary email address, you can continue the deletion process by follow the insturctions in the email.

source_string: Account deletion confirmation email sent, please check your email inbox.
translation: Account deletion confirmation email sent, please check your email inbox.

source_string: Password reset link sent, please check your email inbox.
translation: Password reset link sent, please check your email inbox.

source_string: We will send an email to your primary email address to reset your password.
translation: We will send an email to your primary email address to reset your password.

source_string: Multi-factor authentication to ensure safety and convience
translation: Multi-factor authentication to ensure safety and convience

source_string: Permanently delete your account and all your data
translation: Permanently delete your account and all your data

source_string: This page allows you to manage your account security, privacy, and other settings. If you need assistance, please contact support.
translation: This page allows you to manage your account security, privacy, and other settings. If you need assistance, please contact support.

source_string: You're not signed in or session expired, please sign in again.
translation: You're not signed in or session expired, please sign in again.

source_string: Content truncated, tap to view full post
translation: Content truncated, tap to view full post

source_string: Are you sure you want to delete this authentication factor? This action cannot be undone.
translation: Are you sure you want to delete this authentication factor? This action cannot be undone.

source_string: Are you sure you want to disable this authentication factor? You can enable it again later.
translation: Are you sure you want to disable this authentication factor? You can enable it again later.

source_string: Please enter the code that generated by the factor to enable it.
translation: Please enter the code that generated by the factor to enable it.

source_string: Create an secret for this factor.
translation: Create an secret for this factor.

source_string: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app to set up TOTP authentication
translation: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app to set up TOTP authentication

source_string: No QR code available for this authentication factor
translation: No QR code available for this authentication factor

source_string: You need provide a part of your contact method and we will send the verification code to that contact method if it matched our records
translation: You need provide a part of your contact method and we will send the verification code to that contact method if it matched our records

source_string: See devices you currently logged in.
translation: See devices you currently logged in.

source_string: Are you sure you want to logout this device? This will also disable the push notification to this device.
translation: Are you sure you want to logout this device? This will also disable the push notification to this device.

source_string: Enter a name for this device
translation: Enter a name for this device

source_string: Press Enter to send messages, use Shift+Enter for new line.
translation: Press Enter to send messages, use Shift+Enter for new line.

source_string: This page allows you to manage your app settings, appearance, and behavior. If you need assistance, please contact support.
translation: This page allows you to manage your app settings, appearance, and behavior. If you need assistance, please contact support.

source_string: Your email will be used for account recovery and notifications
translation: Your email will be used for account recovery and notifications

source_string: Your phone number will be used for account recovery and notifications
translation: Your phone number will be used for account recovery and notifications

source_string: Your physical address will be used for shipping and billing purposes.
translation: Your physical address will be used for shipping and billing purposes.

source_string: Verification code sent to your contact method
translation: Verification code sent to your contact method

source_string: The contact method is added, but not verified yet. You can verify it by tapping it and select verify.
translation: The contact method is added, but not verified yet. You can verify it by tapping it and select verify.

source_string: Manage your contact methods for account recovery and notifications
translation: Manage your contact methods for account recovery and notifications

source_string: The auth factor is added, but it is not enabled yet. You can enable it by tapping it and enter the verification code.
translation: The auth factor is added, but it is not enabled yet. You can enable it by tapping it and enter the verification code.

source_string: Set this contact method as your primary contact method for account recovery and notifications
translation: Set this contact method as your primary contact method for account recovery and notifications

source_string: Are you sure to delete this contact method? This action cannot be undone.
translation: Are you sure to delete this contact method? This action cannot be undone.

source_string: Decide how many notifications you will receive.
translation: Decide how many notifications you will receive.

source_string: The notify level has been updated to {}.
translation: The notify level has been updated to {}.

source_string: Set a time, before that time, your notification level will be metions only, to take a break of the current topic they're talking about.
translation: Set a time, before that time, your notification level will be metions only, to take a break of the current topic they're talking about.

source_string: Enter your 6-digit PIN to confirm payment
translation: Enter your 6-digit PIN to confirm payment

source_string: Use biometric authentication to confirm payment
translation: Use biometric authentication to confirm payment

source_string: Biometric authentication failed. Please try again.
translation: Biometric authentication failed. Please try again.

source_string: Features unlocked at your current level will be displayed here.
translation: Features unlocked at your current level will be displayed here.

source_string: Enter your payment provider and order ID to restore your purchase.
translation: Enter your payment provider and order ID to restore your purchase.
